text.title: Service Ownership Map Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether service-ownership-map-template applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the org have ≥5 services AND multiple owning teams?

branch.conclusion: Maintain Markdown ownership map in repo.

example.description: When `yes AND backstage_in_use` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r3` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
